name: bandit.local_sight_avoid_exposed_mcw
description: Bandit live product matrix scenario 6: start from nearby-owned-site local-contact footing with the player moved to an exposed south-of-shelter sightline, disable safe mode, advance a bounded 20-turn live window, and prove the scout/stalker reacts through normal local movement/pathing rather than teleporting or receiving visible-beeline credit.

steps.label: post_load_bandit_exposed_sightline_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams bandit exposed sight-avoid fixture; this is startup/load evidence plus before-action screen proof, not feature closure by itself
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later exposure/sight-avoid artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: disable_safe_mode_for_bandit_exposed_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode has been toggled so the bounded live scout/stalker sight-avoidance window can advance under player control
steps.failure_rule: If this input is unproven, subsequent turn advancement cannot be credited as controlled scenario action.

steps.label: advance_20_turns_for_bandit_sight_avoid
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded 20-turn exposed-scout window has completed; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact showing bandit_camp hold_off/recent exposure and adjacent sight-avoid reposition distance=1
steps.failure_rule: If the bounded window is unproven or the same-run artifact lacks bandit exposure/hold-off/sight-avoid evidence, this scenario is not product proof.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_bandit_sight_avoid_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the bandit exposed-scout window, proving the game remained responsive after bounded reposition/hold-off probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, the run is not a clean audited probe.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_bandit_sight_avoid_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the bandit exposed-scout probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

evidence_contract.claim: bandit scout/stalker sight-avoidance reacts through live local turns by holding or bounded adjacent repositioning, not teleporting or receiving visible-beeline credit
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for bandit behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, input ledger, bounded-window ledger, bandit site match, exposure state, hold-off posture, non-shakedown/non-combat artifact, or adjacent sight-avoid reposition artifact is missing or non-green.
